title: 2-Pack Over The Door Hook - with 3 Hang Heads & Snug Fit Pads- 2Pcs Heavy Duty Hooks for Hanging Coats, Towels, Caps & Wreath - Elegant Matt Finish - No Drill Hanger Organizer - Gold
features: STURDY METAL HOOKS FOR HANGING. Our over the door clothes hanger is made from zinc alloy that can hold up to 20 pounds for each hook, ideal as a robe & towel hook for bathroom, hat hanger, coat hook, cubicle hook, closet hook & more.

SNUG FIT MULTIPLE SPONGE PADS. The versatile design of our 3-head bathroom hooks for towels allows you to mount them on any door sizes up to 1.47" thickness for it includes sponges in varied sizes. These pads makes this hook anti-wobble and anti-scratch to perfectly fit and protect your door surfaces while maintaining stability.

NO DRILL OVER THE DOOR RACK. This handy and instant hook rack is a quick and easy solution to hanging wreaths, bags, and other necessities without the need for drilling, nailing, or hammering. You can hang and transfer these bathroom towel hooks with convenience and flexibility!

RUST AND MOISTURE RESISTANT. These multi-use and heavy-duty hooks have a polished finish that prevents moisture and water from accumulating rust and grime. You can now use our versatile shower towel hooks for bathroom doors, or outdoor garage for a longer period.

ELEGANT 2-HANG HEADS HOOK RACK. Our towel hanger for the door is designed to be compatible with all types of room motifs. Having its classic ball-shaped tip attached to long and angled 3-prong hangers, these come in 3 color selections of luxurious gold, classic silver, and modern black.
description: Heavy-Duty Iron Construction This multipurpose slim over-the-door hook is made from premium iron that securely fits most standard doors up to 1.49" thickness, making it ideal as an entryway hook, robe hook, and towel hanger for bathroom, cabinets, and front doors. Superior Protective Design Keep your things organized in a space-saving way with our nonslip over the door towel rack secured with its soft sponge pads stuck on the edge of the extended upper hook. This prevents your items from sliding and damaging your door surfaces. It also has stylish rounded ends that protect garments from tearing and slipping out. Quick and Flexible Mounting Never worry about the tiring chore of drilling or hammering with our quick-to-mount and easy-to-remove-over-the-door wreath hanger. It comes with pads of 2 varied sizes that can adapt to most types of doors. You can have this as your instant hook for hanging towels, wet clothes, scarves, bags, and all other essentials for easy access. Elegant & Moisture Proof The polished black finish creates rust and moisture-resistant barrier making it perfect for use as outdoor towel hooks for wet belongings like bathrobes, umbrellas, coats, and more. This over the door coat rack is your new hack to organize your home and office while adding a classy and sleek style to this extra storage space. You can always be ready with these shower door hooks as you plan for your home organization or for your travel storage needs. Choose from our wide selection of stylish colors and designs of these door hangers for clothing and other essentials!
